name: cowrite
description: A local AI co-writing canvas with MCP, Image2, slides, WeChat layout, and writing optimization skills.

interface.shortDescription: Co-write Markdown pages in a local browser canvas
interface.longDescription: Cowrite starts a private local writing canvas and lets Codex create, revise, illustrate, and structure Markdown pages through revision-safe MCP tools and bundled Skills.
defaultPrompt: 启动 Cowrite 并告诉我本地画布地址
在 cowrite 里创建一篇文章
把当前 Cowrite 页面转换为 Slides
把当前 Cowrite 页面排版成公众号 HTML
